brand.name: Mint Ledger
brand.value_prop: Mint Ledger automates AP, AR, and reconciliation for SMBs. Connect your bank and accounting software; the books update themselves.
brand.target_audience: founders and operators at small businesses

spec.notes:
Design reference: clerk.dev, vercel.com/login, supabase.com/dashboard/sign-in. Backgrounds are soft gradient fields (palette anchor at 8-12% saturation, blending to a light neutral). Auth content lives in centered cards (~420px wide) with a frosted-glass effect: subtle backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent white background (rgba(255,255,255,0.7)), 1px translucent border.

Each form: brand mark on top, page title (e.g. 'Sign up for Mint Ledger'), 1-2 social-login buttons with provider icons, divider ("or continue with email"), 2-3 form fields with subtle backgrounds, primary CTA filled with the palette anchor, footer link to the other auth page.

Onboarding-step pages: same card treatment + a 3-dot or progress-bar indicator showing 'step N of M'. Dashboard-empty: centered icon + headline + sub-copy + primary CTA, NO sidebar yet (user is fresh).

Avoid: heavy shadows, busy backgrounds, opaque white cards (defeats glassy), oversaturated gradients (defeats pastel).
